steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Let $I$ = introductory fee (first 3 lessons) and $r$ = fee per additional lesson.
Student 1 (6 lessons): $I + 3r = 150$
Student 2 (17 lessons): $I + 14r = 480$
Subtract the first from the second: $11r = 330$, so $r = 30$. Back-substitute: $I = 150 - 3(30) = 60$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
For $x$ lessons the cost is $I$ plus $r$ for each lesson beyond 3:
$$f(x) = 60 + 30(x-3) = 60 + 30x - 90 = 30x - 30$$
